This Revolutionary New Insole Can Provide Long-Lasting Foot Pain Relief, Finally

GET UP TO 40% OFF NOW

Over 1,000+ ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5-Star Reviews & Counting

"These were the only insoles that had enough support for me and took the pressure off my heels..."

Ouch! If you experience foot pain like I do, then you need to read what just happened in San Diego…

…because someone finally stood up and did something about the“foot pain epidemic”that’s been crushing the sensitive bones in our feet for years.

Yeah, that’s right – I’m calling it an epidemic. Why?

Because even though 8 in 10 Americans experience foot pain, your only options for relieving it are either unreasonably expensive or completely ineffective.1

To make matters worse, unchecked foot pain can lead to far more dangerous conditions – such as chronic back pain, Plantar Fasciitis, Over Pronation (Flat Feet), Arthritis, Fibromyalgia, and more. According to national surveys.2

Personally, my pain has only gotten worse since it started 3 years ago. My foot pain distracts me constantly – and it prevents me from doing the things I used to love, like gardening and going for long walks.

Can you relate?

Well I finally discovered a cool little product THAT ACTUALLY WORKS. This is literally changing lives. It changed mine. And it’s about to change yours too!

Sole Insole was created by the Laina Gossman while she was working in an orthotics shoe boutique in San Diego when she noticed something strange…

A large number of her customers would come in and leave the shop without getting true relief – and they all wanted the same thing: a new design or technique that would truly solve their discomfort.

Laina saw this as a challenge – and thankfully for all of us, Laina also happens to have a background in kinesiology and biomechanics. So she had an idea: to reproduce the same powerful relief that comes from orthotics in a simple, affordable insole that anyone could use.

Now, before you say to yourself: “Those shoe insert things don’t work!” please know, I thought the same thing too, at first!

What is it?

Simply put, Soul Insole is the world’s first “micro-orthotic insole”.

The insoles give you the benefits of expensive orthotics – but without the price tag, office visits or clunky equipment which can quickly add up to hundreds of dollars.

You place them in your shoes (or boots, or high-heels, or even sandals) and viola! You’ll enjoy immediate, soothing relief – first to your feet, and then to your legs, back, or wherever else the pain has spread.

The insoles are super easy to use, too. They don’t require cutting or measuring, and thanks to their high-quality materials, they also last an incredibly long time – up to several years!

Even better, they haven’t changed the fit of any of my shoes, and they don’t “crowd the toe”, cause “heel slippage”, or any of that stuff that bothered me so much about “normal” insoles.

I’ve never seen or felt anything like Soul Insole – and as I mentioned, I feel like I’ve tried everything!

How Does it Work?

The secret is in the high-performance memory gel and biomechanical design, borrowed from the most advanced orthotic procedures.

These elements work together to redistribute pressure evenly across the foot, which helps relieve pressure from both the heel and the forefoot. 

As you wear them, Soul Insole's patented orthotic design softly guides your foot into proper alignment throughout the day.

This means Soul Insole’s unique design actually teaches your feet to stand properly – meaning they can even relieve your foot pain for good!

This in turn will help align your entire body from the ground up. (Bonus: having this proper posture also helps prevent the back and neck pain that are often the result of problems in your feet!)

Who Should Use Soul Insole?

Simply put, anyone experiencing foot, knee, leg, or back pain should give Soul Insole a shot – there’s a reason it’s the top choice for top athletic therapists and medical practitioners worldwide.

That said, there are some people who truly need an innovation like Soul Insole, such as:

  • Anyone who likes wearing high-heels, or shoes that typically cause you discomfort.
  • Runners, joggers, walkers, or high-impact sports players.
  • Anyone with flat feet or high arches.
  • Anyone with foot ailments such as Plantar Fasciitis, Over Pronation (Flat Feet), Arthritis, Fibromyalgia, Neuroma, Metatarsalgia, Bunions, Hammer Toes, Heel Spur, Achilles tendonitis, Posterior Tibial Tendonitis, Multiple Sclerosis (MS) and High Arches.
  • Anyone with ankle, leg, back, or neck pain who thinks that foot pain could be the root cause.

Another great thing about Soul Insole is that the same product works for everyone - men, women and kids!

What Else We Love About Soul lnsole

  • It Relieves Foot, Back & Body Pain – The patented design softly guides the foot into proper alignment, which in turn helps to align the body from the bottom up. This creates a relaxed, soothing feeling at the arches, heels, ankles, legs and lower back! Great for Plantar Fasciitis and other foot ailments!
  • It Reduces Stress – A gentle foot massage combined with relief from body aches and pains can alleviate built-up stress and tension. Get ready to sit back & relax completely. Many customers say it’s like, “walking on clouds.”
  • It Boosts Energy – Soul Insole provides shock absorption, energy return and pain relief. This helps in sustaining energy levels throughout the day.
  • It Works In EVERY Shoe (Even Sandals!) – From sneakers and heels to dress shoes, boots and more – you can now enjoy increased support, balance, and comfort in all the shoes you like to wear. Comes in multiple sizes for Men, Women and Kids!
  • It's Easy To Apply & Clean – Placing the insoles inside any shoe is fast and simple (no trimming needed!) and the adhesive will keep them firmly in place. To clean, simply wash them with water and the stickiness will return to new!
  • It's Odorless & Lasts For Years – Made from a non-porous, medical grade gel, your insoles will never stink! The premium materials are also highly-elastic ensuring your insoles will maintain its shape even after years of daily use.
  • Their 60-Day Money Back Guarantee – Their #1 priority is having a positive customer experience! Unlike many others in the industry, they value their customers, and if you are not happy with your order they will give you a full refund.

I hadn’t found anything that could help me with this problem until now, and I’m really thankful that I did!
